issues.description: Ensure every accesskey attribute value is unique
issues.help: accesskey attribute value should be unique
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
issues.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
issues.help: Frames must have an accessible name
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
issues.help: Heading levels should only increase by one
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.help: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.
Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.help: <li> elements must be contained in a <ul> or <ol>
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
issues.help: Interactive controls must not be nested
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
issues.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure elements that have scrollable content are accessible by keyboard
issues.help: Scrollable region must have keyboard access
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.

issues.description: Ensure select element has an accessible name
issues.help: Select element must have an accessible name
issues.recommendation: Refer to WCAG technique guidance for this rule.
